title: macOS Package Metadata
description: Platform-specific packaging metadata for macOS titles. Located at macos/package.yaml in each title repo.

packaging_version.description: Internal packaging iteration. Increment when re-packaging without a vendor version change.

receipt_id.description: macOS installer receipt identifier used for detection and uninstall (e.g. 'com.google.chrome').

install_script.description: Optional override for the install script path (relative to macos/src/). Default uses the framework build-pkg.sh.

uninstall_script.description: Optional path to a custom uninstall script (relative to macos/src/).

jamf_category.description: Default Jamf category for this title (e.g. 'Browsers'). Can be overridden in jamf/package-inputs.json.

pre_install_script.description: Optional preinstall script filename in macos/src/ (runs before the pkg install).

post_install_script.description: Optional postinstall script filename in macos/src/ (runs after the pkg install).
